monolithic.name: Monolithic (No Schema)
monolithic.description: Single-shot prompt with JSON MIME enforcement but no response schema

monolithic_schema.name: Monolithic (Strict Schema)
monolithic_schema.description: Single-shot prompt with API-level response schema enforcement

optimized_monolithic.name: Optimized Monolithic
optimized_monolithic.description: Shorter, pattern-driven system prompt with JSON MIME enforcement

lazy_optimized.name: Lazy Optimized (A1-B1)
lazy_optimized.description: Optimized prompt that deliberately returns only A1, A2, and B1 examples

pipeline.name: Pipeline (Multi-stage)
pipeline.description: Sequential decomposition into extraction, CEFR generation, and SpokenFi transformation

cascade.name: Structured Cascade
cascade.description: Parallelized multi-stage approach with per-stage thinking controls

thinking_budget.name: Thinking Budget (4096)
thinking_budget.description: Monolithic baseline with an explicit thinking budget cap

pro_model.name: Pro Model
pro_model.description: Same task on Gemini Pro for cost and stability comparison
